description_for_human: ผู้นำเข้าและจำหน่ายคอมพิวเตอร์อุตสาหกรรม Mini PC, Panel PC, Rugged Tablet, Industrial Switch ในประเทศไทย
description_for_model: ENT Group Co., Ltd. is an authorized distributor of industrial computing products in Thailand since 2015. Products include Mini PC (GT/GB Series), Panel PC (GK Series), Embedded Fanless PC (iBox/EPC Series), Rugged Tablets, Rugged Notebooks, Rugged Handhelds, Industrial Switches (Volktek), Zero Clients (vCloudPoint), and Server Cabinets. Located in Pak Kret, Nonthaburi 11120. Contact: 02-045-6104, info@entgroup.co.th. Business hours: Mon-Fri 08:30-17:30. Warranty: 1-3 years. Free delivery in Bangkok metropolitan area.
